{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Festival
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Festival]] has recently begun.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
